meta.title: misisimi — Zero2Done Execution
meta.description: misisimi is a client-first execution partner for SMEs. We embed AI into daily operations to increase efficiency and profitability.

hero.title: Practical AI systems that make the business run better
hero.subtitle: We find the right starting point, build the right system, and get it working inside day-to-day operations.

problem.title: Most teams know AI matters. The hard part is where to start.
problem.subtitle: Usually the blocker is not interest. It is messy processes, scattered data, disconnected tools, and no clear first move.

items.title: Manual work slows the team down
items.problem: Core workflows still depend on handoffs, spreadsheets, and manual follow-up.
items.opportunity: We automate the bottlenecks so the team can focus on work that matters.

items.title: Good data sits unused
items.problem: Important business data lives across tools and rarely shapes day-to-day decisions.
items.opportunity: We turn raw data into useful views, models, and decision support.

items.title: Tools do not work as one system
items.problem: You may already have the tools, but not the flow between data, actions, and outcomes.
items.opportunity: We connect tools, workflows, and AI into one operating system.

items.title: AI sounds useful, but the next step is fuzzy
items.problem: Many projects stall because the path from idea to rollout feels expensive, risky, or vague.
items.opportunity: We start with a diagnostic and turn AI into a practical next step.

services.title: What we deliver
services.subtitle: Three ways to work with us. Each one is scoped, practical, and tied to a real outcome.

items.title: AI Development
items.body: We design and build AI systems around your operations and data.

items.title: AI Consulting
items.body: We help you decide where AI will pay off and what to do first.

items.title: AI Automation Tools
items.body: We ship lightweight tools that remove repetitive work fast.

approach.title: How the work moves from first call to rollout
approach.subtitle: One simple model: find the right use case, build the system, then launch and improve it.

items.title: Find the best place to start
items.description: We review the workflow, data, and constraints to see where AI can create measurable value first.
items.output: Diagnostic brief, priority use cases, and ROI direction

items.title: Build the right system
items.description: We turn the chosen use case into architecture, workflows, integrations, and production-ready delivery.
items.output: Solution design, implementation, and integrated rollout

items.title: Launch, learn, improve
items.description: We put the system into live operations, check the outcome, and refine it based on real usage.
items.output: Production release, monitoring, and ongoing optimization

pricing.title: Pricing tied to delivered value — not hours
pricing.subtitle: Start with a diagnostic. Then scope the work in value credits, based on what actually needs to be delivered.

principle.title: Value Credit System
principle.benefit: The cost stays tied to concrete outcomes, which makes planning much easier.

entryOffer.title: AI Diagnostic
entryOffer.output: A clear problem frame, opportunity map, and next-step recommendation.
entryOffer.action: From there it is easy to choose between automation, a custom system, or a phased rollout.

projectRange.title: Credit Scale
projectRange.use: A practical reference for size and cost before you commit to a larger rollout.

useCases.title: Where AI creates value fastest
useCases.subtitle: A few common problem-solution-outcome patterns that turn into measurable wins quickly.

items.title: Operations Automation
items.problem: Manual workflows waste time and create bottlenecks.

items.title: Customer Support AI
items.problem: Support teams face the same questions again and again.
items.solution: AI assistants trained on your company context and process rules.

items.title: Data Insights and Forecasting
items.problem: Teams make decisions without a clear operational picture.
items.solution: Forecasting models, dashboards, and decision support built on real data.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: The main questions teams usually want answered before starting.

questions.a: We deliver diagnostics, roadmaps, automations, custom AI systems, and working implementations inside real operations.
It fits teams that want useful AI outcomes without building a full internal AI function first.
We review the workflow, current tools, data readiness, bottlenecks, and likely opportunities. You leave with a clear recommendation on what to build first and why.
Diagnostics usually take 24 to 72 hours. Delivery work often runs 2 to 8 weeks, depending on scope and integration depth.

questions.q: Do I need internal technical knowledge?
questions.a: No. We handle architecture, build, and rollout. Your team mainly brings business context, access, and feedback.

questions.q: Do you integrate with existing systems?
questions.a: Yes. The goal is not a disconnected demo. It is a working system that fits your existing stack and process.
Pricing starts with a fixed diagnostic, then grows through value credits tied to deliverables instead of open-ended hourly work.
You get a recommended next step. That can be a focused automation, a custom AI system, or a phased roadmap.
We only access the data that is needed. The default approach is minimal access, clear boundaries, and agreed scope before implementation starts.
Yes. Support and optimization can be included when the system needs monitoring, iteration, or handoff.

contact.title: Get Your AI Diagnostic
contact.description: Start with a clear view of where AI can help most. We review the workflow, spot the best opportunity, and outline the fastest path forward.

trust.label: Engagement
trust.text: Diagnostic first. Clear delivery scope next.

trust.label: Scope
trust.text: Fits automation, internal tools, applied AI systems, and integration-heavy work.

form.name: Name
form.message: Tell us which workflow, bottleneck, or repeated task you want to improve

success.title: Diagnostic Requested
success.text: Thank you. We will review the details and get back to you within 24–72 hours.

footer.tagline: From AI idea to something your team can actually use.
